key_finding: LLM-powered decisions create real agent score separation

deterministic_inference.reason: Same deterministic logic for all models

llm_powered_inference.reason: Different models make different decisions based on reasoning quality
llm_powered_inference.llm_usage: Task B, C, D decisions + counterfactuals

gpt_3_5_turbo.notes: Lower score on CASE-D-001 (0.92 vs expected 0.97) - missed some fraud indicators

gpt_4o.notes: More consistent, better reasoning on complex cases

why_separation_occurs.task_b: LLM must analyze invoice vs PO vs receipt - weaker models may miss discrepancies
why_separation_occurs.task_c: LLM must detect fraud patterns (bank mismatch, duplicates) - weaker models may miss signals
why_separation_occurs.task_d: LLM must analyze complex fraud vectors (email spoofing, threshold evasion) - biggest separation
